full_name: AICPA SOC 2 — Service Organization Control (Trust Services Criteria)
authority: American Institute of Certified Public Accountants (AICPA)

controls.requirement: Commitment to Integrity and Ethical Values
controls.description: Management demonstrates commitment to integrity and ethical values through policies, standards of conduct, and organizational actions.
controls.logic: FAIL if no code_of_conduct document exists with employee_acknowledgement, or if acknowledgement_rate < 95%, or if conduct_violations exist with no documented investigation.

controls.description: The board demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight of internal controls.
controls.logic: FAIL if audit_committee_meetings in the last 12 months < 4, or if no independent board members are registered in the governance records.

controls.description: Security policies and procedures must be communicated internally so that personnel understand their responsibilities.
controls.logic: FAIL if any active employee has policy_acknowledgement_status = 'PENDING' or policy_acknowledged_date older than 12 months.

controls.description: A formal risk assessment process must be conducted at least annually to identify and evaluate risks to achieving service commitments.
controls.logic: FAIL if no risk_assessment record exists with completion_date in the last 12 months, or if assessment_scope excludes critical systems.

controls.description: The organization performs ongoing evaluations to ascertain whether controls are present and functioning.
controls.logic: FAIL if no control_monitoring record exists for the current quarter, or if monitoring_deficiencies exist with no remediation_plan.

controls.requirement: Policies and Procedures to Mitigate Risk
controls.description: The organization selects and develops control activities to mitigate risks including segregation of duties.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user has conflicting duties: both initiate_payment AND approve_payment permissions in the same system.

controls.domain: CC6: Logical and Physical Access Controls
controls.requirement: Logical Access Restricted to Authorized Users
controls.description: Logical access to systems and data must be restricted to authorized individuals based on least privilege.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user account has access_level exceeding role_definition, or if access_request_approval is NULL for active access grants.

controls.domain: CC6: Logical and Physical Access Controls
controls.description: Multi-factor authentication must be required for access to production systems and remote access.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user with access to production_system = TRUE or remote_access = TRUE has mfa_enabled = FALSE.

controls.domain: CC6: Logical and Physical Access Controls
controls.requirement: Access Removal Upon Termination or Role Change
controls.description: Access rights must be revoked or modified within 24 hours of termination or material role change.
controls.logic: FAIL if any terminated_user record has account_status = 'ACTIVE' after termination_date, or if access_revocation_date - termination_date > 1.

controls.domain: CC6: Logical and Physical Access Controls
controls.description: Periodic user access reviews must be conducted to ensure access rights remain appropriate.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user account has last_access_review_date older than 90 days for privileged users or 6 months for standard users.

controls.domain: CC6: Logical and Physical Access Controls
controls.requirement: Encryption of Data at Rest and in Transit
controls.description: Sensitive data must be encrypted at rest and during transmission.
controls.logic: FAIL if any customer_data or service_data record has encryption_at_rest = FALSE, or if any API endpoint transmitting sensitive data has tls_enabled = FALSE.

controls.description: The organization monitors system components to detect anomalies and unauthorized activities.
controls.logic: FAIL if monitoring_enabled = FALSE for any critical system, or if no security_alert was reviewed in the last 24 hours.

controls.description: Security incidents must be identified, responded to, and recovered from according to defined procedures.
controls.logic: FAIL if any security_incident record has no incident_response_plan_applied, or if incident_status = 'OPEN' for incidents older than 30 days without documented justification.

controls.description: Data backup and recovery procedures must be in place, documented, and tested periodically.
controls.logic: FAIL if backup_test_date is older than 6 months, or if backup_test_result = 'FAILED', or if no backup_procedure_documentation exists.

controls.description: System changes must follow a defined process including authorization, testing, and documentation prior to deployment.
controls.logic: FAIL if any deployment record has no change_request_id, or if change_request_approval_status != 'APPROVED', or if pre_deployment_testing_completed = FALSE.

controls.description: The organization identifies and manages risks from third-party vendors to protect service commitments.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical vendor has no risk_assessment on file, or if vendor_contract lacks security_requirements clauses, or if last_vendor_review_date is older than 12 months.

controls.description: The system must be available for operation and use as committed in service level agreements.
controls.logic: FAIL if system uptime percentage in the last 30 days is less than sla_uptime_commitment, or if sla_breach_count > 0 without documented remediation.

controls.description: Information designated as confidential must be protected through the entire data lifecycle including disposal.
controls.logic: FAIL if any record with data_classification = 'CONFIDENTIAL' has been shared with parties not listed in authorized_recipients, or if disposal_method = 'UNSECURED'.
